title: athlete — settings
description: Tenant-facing preferences (athlete lifecycle defaults, consent workflow toggles, retention preferences) + user-level preferences (guardian display preferences for the /me/athletes surface).

groups.label: Athletes
groups.description: Tenant-wide athlete lifecycle defaults + feature opt-ins.

sections.label: Minor age boundaries
sections.description: Age at which the athlete is considered a minor for consent + safeguarding purposes.

fields.name: minor_min_age
fields.label: Minor age threshold
fields.helpText: Athletes below this age require guardian-recorded consent. 13 = US COPPA minimum; 16 = GDPR default; 18 = safeguarding-conservative.

sections.label: Medical tracking
sections.description: Enable medical fields on athlete rows. Data is regulated_health-tier, retained 7 years.

fields.name: enable_medical_tracking
fields.label: Track medical information
fields.helpText: Enables the medical_* columns + the /medical sub-resource. Regulated_health-tier data with 7-year retention. Turning this on writes a compliance audit row.

sections.label: Consent workflow
sections.description: Full recordable consent workflow with expiry + revocation history.

fields.name: enable_consent_workflow
fields.label: Enable full consent workflow
fields.helpText: Enterprise-only. Adds 12-month re-consent cadence + per-purpose expiry log. When off, consent is a bare three-boolean snapshot.

fields.name: reconsent_cadence_days
fields.label: Re-consent cadence (days)
fields.helpText: How often consents must be re-recorded. GDPR audit best-practice is annual (365 days).

fields.name: age_group_change_notify_guardian
fields.label: Notify guardians when child's age group flips
fields.helpText: Sends AthleteAgeGroupSnapshotChangedNotification when the nightly job detects a birthday-drift or catalog-change flip.

fields.name: graduate_purge_after_years
fields.label: Purge graduated athletes after (years)
fields.helpText: 0 = never purge graduated athletes (default, retains alumni indefinitely). Set to 10 or 15 for privacy-conscious tenants that don't want long-term alumni retention.

groups.label: My athletes
groups.description: Per-user preferences for how the /me/athletes surface + notification cadence work.

fields.name: receive_age_group_change_notifications
fields.label: Notify me when my child's age group changes

fields.name: receive_consent_expiring_reminders
fields.label: Notify me when my child's consents are expiring
